message:
🌱 Add kyverno: [Bug][helm] "bitnami/kubectl" will soon be suject to mission (#1052)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kyverno-13683-bug-helm-bitnami-kubectl-will-soon-be-suject-to-bitnami-registrati",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kyverno: [Bug][helm] \"bitnami/kubectl\" will soon be suject to bitnami registration/license",
+    "description": "[Bug][helm] \"bitnami/kubectl\" will soon be suject to bitnami registration/license. This issue affects 11+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kyverno troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kyverno deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno -n kyverno --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kyverno configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kyverno configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno\nkubectl get configmap -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kyverno\n```\n`bitnami/kubectl` repository will not be freely available from 28/08/2025."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Bug][helm] \"bitnami/kubectl\" will soon be suject to…",
+        "description": "This PR updates helm hooks to use `rancher/kubectl` instead of `bitnami/kubectl` and removes unused hooks\n- Closes https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/10614\n- Closes https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/13683\n- Relates to https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/13717 (could potentially\n```yaml\nwebhooksCleanup:\n  image:\n    repository: bitnamilegacy/kubectl\npolicyReportsCleanup:\n  image:\n    repository: bitnamilegacy/kubectl\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade kyverno to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade kyverno:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade kyverno kyverno/kyverno --namespace kyverno\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kyverno\nhelm list -n kyverno\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Bug][helm] \"bitnami/kubectl\" will soon be suject… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno -n kyverno --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kyverno --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR updates helm hooks to use `rancher/kubectl` instead of `bitnami/kubectl` and removes unused hooks\n- Closes https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/10614\n- Closes https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/13683\n- Relates to https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/13717 (could potentially close)\n\n### Proof Manifests\n\n1.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "webhooksCleanup:\n  image:\n    repository: bitnamilegacy/kubectl\npolicyReportsCleanup:\n  image:\n    repository: bitnamilegacy/kubectl",
+        "$ kubectl get validatingwebhookconfiguration\nNAME                                            WEBHOOKS   AGE\nkyverno-cel-exception-validating-webhook-cfg    1          6m15s\nkyverno-cleanup-validating-webhook-cfg          1          6m29s\nkyverno-exception-validating-webhook-cfg        1          6m15s\nkyverno-global-context-validating-webhook-cfg   1          6m15s\nkyverno-policy-validating-webhook-cfg           1          6m15s\nkyverno-resource-validating-webhook-cfg         0          6m15s\nkyverno-ttl-validating-webhook-cfg              1          6m29s",
+        "$ kubectl get cm kyverno\nNAME      DATA   AGE\nkyverno   8      75m"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kyverno",
+      "incubating",
+      "security",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kyverno"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Configmap",
+      "Mutatingwebhookconfiguration"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/13683",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/pull/13716"
+    },
+    "reactions": 11,
+    "comments": 6,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kyverno installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-14T06:25:17.759Z",
